fields.name: Vehicle Spares
fields.description: Auto-created from marketplace: Spare parts for vehicles

fields.label: Engine Start & Idle Quality
fields.help_text: Cold start and warm idle — listen for knocking, misfires, rough idle

fields.label: Engine Oil Level & Condition
fields.help_text: Check dipstick — color, level, milky appearance indicates water ingress

fields.label: Coolant Level & Condition
fields.help_text: Check reservoir and radiator cap — rust or oil contamination

fields.label: Transmission Shift Quality (All Gears)
fields.help_text: Test all gears including reverse — slipping, grinding, delays

fields.label: Clutch Engagement Point (Manual)
fields.help_text: Clutch biting point — high biting point indicates wear

fields.label: Engine Oil Leaks (Visual)
fields.help_text: Check under hood and beneath car for oil drips or seeping gaskets

fields.label: Timing Belt/Chain Condition
fields.help_text: Check service history — timing belt typically replaced at 80,000–100,000 km

fields.label: Exhaust Smoke Color & Odor
fields.help_text: Blue=oil burn, White=coolant burn, Black=rich mixture — all fail triggers

fields.label: Power Steering Fluid Level
fields.help_text: Check reservoir — low level may indicate leak

fields.label: Drive Shaft & CV Joints
fields.help_text: Turn steering full lock and accelerate — clicking indicates CV joint failure

fields.label: Fuel System (No Leaks, Correct Pressure)
fields.help_text: Check for fuel smell, leaks at injectors and fuel lines

fields.label: Engine Compression Test
fields.help_text: Cylinder compression — deviation >10% between cylinders is fail trigger

fields.label: Paintwork Condition & Color Match
fields.help_text: Use paint thickness gauge if available — respray indicates accident repair

fields.label: Panel Gaps & Alignment
fields.help_text: Uneven gaps indicate accident damage or poor repair

fields.label: Rust & Corrosion Assessment
fields.help_text: Check wheel arches, sills, floor, chassis — structural rust is fail

fields.label: Glass & Windscreen (Chips/Cracks)
fields.help_text: Any crack in driver sight line is mandatory replacement

fields.label: Doors, Boot & Bonnet Operation
fields.help_text: All should open, close and latch smoothly with proper alignment

fields.label: VIN/Chassis Number Verification
fields.help_text: Match chassis plate, windscreen sticker and registration documents — mismatch is fraud flag

fields.label: Undercarriage Rust & Damage
fields.help_text: Lift vehicle or use mirror — check chassis rails, floor pan, crossmembers

fields.label: Airbag System (Warning Light)
fields.help_text: SRS warning light off after startup — if on, system is compromised

fields.label: Headlights, Taillights & Indicators
fields.help_text: All lights operational including hazards, reversing lights, number plate light

fields.label: Wiper Blades & Washer System
fields.help_text: Wiper sweep quality and washer jet aim

fields.label: Front Shock Absorbers
fields.help_text: Bounce test — should settle within 1–2 oscillations. Leaking = fail

fields.label: Rear Shock Absorbers
fields.help_text: Same bounce test — note any difference side-to-side

fields.label: Brake Pad Thickness (Front)
fields.help_text: Minimum legal thickness 3mm — below 2mm immediate fail

fields.label: Brake Pad Thickness (Rear)
fields.help_text: Check via caliper inspection or wheel removal if accessible

fields.label: Brake Disc Condition (Front & Rear)
fields.help_text: Check for scoring, warping, minimum thickness marking

fields.label: Handbrake Effectiveness
fields.help_text: Should hold vehicle on gradient — count ratchet clicks (optimal 3–5)

fields.label: ABS System (Warning Light)
fields.help_text: ABS light should go off after engine start — test on low-speed brake application

fields.label: Steering Play & Alignment
fields.help_text: Measure free play in steering wheel — excessive play indicates worn rack or ball joints

fields.label: Wheel Bearing Condition
fields.help_text: Jack each corner — wobble = bearing play. Spin wheel — grinding = worn bearing

fields.label: Tyre Tread Depth (All Four)
fields.help_text: Legal minimum 1.6mm — check inside, center, outside with tread gauge

fields.label: Air Conditioning (Cooling Temp)
fields.help_text: Measure vent temperature — should reach 10–15°C on full cold

fields.label: All Power Windows Operation
fields.help_text: Test up/down smoothness and auto-close on all windows

fields.label: Infotainment, Bluetooth & USB
fields.help_text: Connect phone via Bluetooth and USB — test audio output

fields.label: Instrument Cluster (All Gauges)
fields.help_text: Fuel, temperature, speedometer, warning lights — all should function

fields.label: Seat Belts (All Positions)
fields.help_text: Test latch, retraction, and inertia lock on all seating positions

fields.label: Central Locking & Key Fob
fields.help_text: All doors lock/unlock remotely and manually

fields.label: Interior Condition & Odor
fields.help_text: Mold, smoke, water damage odors — check under floor mats for damp

fields.label: Odometer Reading & Service History
fields.help_text: Record exact reading — request full service book or digital history

fields.label: Registration Certificate (Log Book)
fields.help_text: Verify owner name matches seller — request title transfer documents

fields.label: Insurance Certificate Validity
fields.help_text: Note expiry date

fields.label: Road Worthiness Certificate
fields.help_text: Valid certificate from SUMATRA

fields.label: Outstanding Finance Check
fields.help_text: Ask seller to confirm no outstanding bank finance — request clearance letter if applicable

fields.label: Accident History Disclosure
fields.help_text: Seller declaration of known accident history — cross-check with bodywork findings

fields.label: Screen Burn-In / Ghost Images
fields.help_text: Display all-gray and all-white screens — ghost images indicate OLED burn-in

fields.label: Dead Pixels & Bright Spots
fields.help_text: Display black screen — any lit pixels are dead/stuck pixel defects

fields.label: Touch Sensitivity (All Screen Zones)
fields.help_text: Draw diagonal lines across all screen edges — dead zones indicate damage

fields.label: Screen Glass Condition (Cracks/Scratches)
fields.help_text: Check under bright light at angles — hairline cracks affect resale severely

fields.label: Display Brightness (Max & Auto)
fields.help_text: Max brightness should match device spec — dim display may indicate degraded backlight

fields.label: Face ID / Fingerprint Reader
fields.help_text: Test biometric unlock — failures may indicate motherboard or sensor damage

fields.label: Battery Health Percentage
fields.help_text: iOS: Settings > Battery > Battery Health. Android: Use AccuBattery app — below 80% is replacement threshold

fields.label: Charge Port Condition & Function
fields.help_text: Inspect for bent pins, lint — test charging with known-good cable

fields.label: Wireless Charging (if applicable)
fields.help_text: Test with compatible pad — functionality confirms charging coil intact

fields.label: Battery Swelling (Visual)
fields.help_text: Screen lifting from body indicates swollen battery — immediate safety fail

fields.label: Charge Cycle Count
fields.help_text: iOS: Use CoconutBattery or similar. Android: Battery info in system settings

fields.label: Rear Camera Photo Quality
fields.help_text: Photograph various subjects — check for autofocus speed, blur, lens marks

fields.label: Front Camera Photo Quality
fields.help_text: Selfie photo test — check sharpness and exposure

fields.label: Video Recording Stability
fields.help_text: Record 30-second video — check stabilization, audio sync, 4K if applicable

fields.label: Camera Lens Condition (No Cracks)
fields.help_text: Inspect physically — cracked lens causes haze in photos

fields.label: SIM Card Slots & Network Reception
fields.help_text: Insert test SIM — verify signal bars and voice call quality

fields.label: Wi-Fi Connection & Speed
fields.help_text: Connect to known network — run speed test, check 5GHz band if applicable

fields.label: Bluetooth Pairing
fields.help_text: Pair with headphones or speaker — test audio output quality

fields.label: GPS Accuracy
fields.help_text: Open maps app outdoors — verify location accuracy within 10m

fields.label: NFC (if applicable)
fields.help_text: Test with NFC-enabled payment terminal or tag

fields.label: IMEI Verification
fields.help_text: Dial *#06# — record both IMEIs. Check blacklist status on GSMA or local registry

fields.label: Speakers & Earpiece Quality
fields.help_text: Play music at max volume — check for distortion. Test earpiece on a call

fields.label: Microphone (Voice & Noise Cancel)
fields.help_text: Record voice memo and play back — check clarity and noise cancellation mic

fields.label: Vibration Motor
fields.help_text: Enable haptic feedback — test vibration intensity and consistency

fields.label: Physical Buttons (Volume, Power, Mute)
fields.help_text: Press all buttons — ensure tactile response and function

fields.label: Operating System Version & Updates
fields.help_text: Record OS version — note if device can still receive security updates

fields.label: iCloud/Google Account Lock Status
fields.help_text: Factory reset should proceed without account prompt — activation lock = fraud flag

fields.label: Water Damage Indicator
fields.help_text: Check SIM slot for red water damage indicator strip — red/pink = water damage

fields.label: Foundation Condition (Visual)
fields.help_text: Look for cracks, settlement, water staining around foundation

fields.label: Load-Bearing Wall Cracks
fields.help_text: Hairline=monitor, >3mm=structural concern, diagonal cracks=subsidence

fields.label: Roof Structure Integrity
fields.help_text: Access roof space if possible — check for sagging rafters, rot, daylight through roof

fields.label: Roof Covering Condition
fields.help_text: Check tiles/iron sheets — cracked, missing, or rusted sheets cause leaks

fields.label: Ceiling Condition
fields.help_text: Water stains indicate past or current roof/plumbing leaks

fields.label: Floor Level & Structural Integrity
fields.help_text: Check for bouncy or sloping floors indicating joist failure or subsidence

fields.label: External Wall Condition
fields.help_text: Check render, pointing, cracks — note any vegetation growth in cracks

fields.label: Damp Proof Course
fields.help_text: Check for rising damp up to 1m on internal walls — tide marks, salt deposits

fields.label: Lintel Condition (Window & Door Openings)
fields.help_text: Cracks above openings indicate failed or missing lintels

fields.label: Drainage Around Foundation
fields.help_text: Ground should slope away from building — pooling water causes foundation damage

fields.label: Asbestos (if pre-1990 construction)
fields.help_text: Flag any suspected asbestos roof/ceiling sheets — requires specialist test

fields.label: Structural Walls (No Unauthorized Removal)
fields.help_text: Compare with any available plans — removed load-bearing walls are critical safety fail

fields.label: Consumer Unit / Fuse Box Condition
fields.help_text: MCBs present, no scorch marks, proper labelling, RCD present

fields.label: Earthing & Bonding
fields.help_text: Earth rod visible or confirmed — bonding to water and gas pipes

fields.label: Socket Outlets (Sample Test All Rooms)
fields.help_text: Use socket tester — check live, neutral, earth wiring. Note polarity failures

fields.label: Lighting Circuit (All Rooms)
fields.help_text: All light switches operate correct lights — check for non-functional switches

fields.label: ELCB/RCD Function Test
fields.help_text: Press test button on RCD — should trip immediately

fields.label: Wiring Condition (Visible Sections)
fields.help_text: Fabric insulation indicates old pre-1960s wiring — flag for full rewire

fields.label: Outdoor/Garden Electrical Points
fields.help_text: Check weatherproofing and RCD protection on external sockets

fields.label: Electric Meter & Tariff Type
fields.help_text: Record meter number and type (prepaid/postpaid) — verify with utility provider

fields.label: Generator/Backup Power Connection
fields.help_text: Check changeover switch — must prevent backfeed to mains grid

fields.label: Security Lighting & External Points
fields.help_text: Motion sensors functional — dusk-to-dawn lights operational

fields.label: Water Supply Pressure
fields.help_text: Check pressure at kitchen tap — normal 1–3 bar. Low pressure indicates main issue

fields.label: Hot Water System (Geyser/Boiler)
fields.help_text: Check age, pressure relief valve, anode rod condition, thermostat setting

fields.label: All Taps & Shower Mixers
fields.help_text: Operate all taps — check for drips, correct hot/cold orientation

fields.label: Toilet Flush & Fill Valve
fields.help_text: Flush — check fill time (should be <2 min), no continuous running

fields.label: Drain Waste & Overflow (All Basins/Baths)
fields.help_text: Fill and drain — check flow rate and no backup between fixtures

fields.label: Waste Pipe & Soil Pipe Condition
fields.help_text: Check for leaks, blockages, proper fall gradient, correct venting

fields.label: Roof Gutters & Downpipes
fields.help_text: Check joints for gaps, blockages, and correct fall to downpipe

fields.label: Septic Tank / Sewage Connection
fields.help_text: Confirm connection type — if septic: last emptying date, leach field condition

fields.label: Water Meter & Connection
fields.help_text: Record meter reading and confirm correct property connection

fields.label: Underground Pipe Condition
fields.help_text: CCTV drain survey recommended for older properties — flagged if suspected blockage

fields.label: Door Lock Quality (All External Doors)
fields.help_text: Check deadbolt throw, frame condition, door material thickness

fields.label: Window Locks & Security
fields.help_text: Test all window locks — note any that cannot be secured

fields.label: Perimeter Wall / Fence Condition
fields.help_text: Check height, structural integrity, anti-climb measures

fields.label: Gate & Gate Motor
fields.help_text: Gate motor operation, remote function, manual override

fields.label: Smoke Detectors
fields.help_text: Test each detector — mandatory in bedrooms and hallways

fields.label: Fire Extinguisher (Present & Valid)
fields.help_text: Check pressure gauge and service date

fields.label: CCTV System (if present)
fields.help_text: Check camera coverage, recording function, night vision

fields.label: Burglar Alarm System
fields.help_text: Test arm/disarm — verify zones cover all entry points

fields.label: Kitchen Units & Worktops
fields.help_text: Check door hinges, worktop condition, water damage under sink

fields.label: Bathroom Tiles & Grouting
fields.help_text: Loose tiles indicate water ingress behind — press each tile to check

fields.label: Floor Covering Condition (All Rooms)
fields.help_text: Tiles, timber, carpet — note damage, lifting edges, squeaks

fields.label: Internal Door Condition & Operation
fields.help_text: All should close and latch — sticking indicates structural movement

fields.label: Wall Finishes & Paintwork
fields.help_text: Note cracks, staining, flaking paint — may indicate damp

fields.label: Built-In Storage & Wardrobes
fields.help_text: Check internal condition, hinges, rail strength

fields.label: Kitchen Appliances (if included)
fields.help_text: Test cooker, oven, extractor, dishwasher if included in sale

fields.label: Air Conditioning Units
fields.help_text: Test cooling and heating modes — check filter condition and drainage

fields.label: Title Deed Verification
fields.help_text: Original title deed — check owner name, plot number, registered area

fields.label: Survey Plan (Cadastral)
fields.help_text: Compare physical boundaries with survey plan — encroachments are fail

fields.label: Building Permit & Approved Plans
fields.help_text: All structures must have approved permits — unauthorized extensions are flagged

fields.label: Occupancy Certificate
fields.help_text: Certificate of occupancy from municipality — required for habitation

fields.label: Land Rates & Service Charges (Up to Date)
fields.help_text: Request rates clearance certificate — unpaid rates transfer to new owner

fields.label: Utility Bills & Accounts
fields.help_text: Check water and electricity accounts are in seller name — request clearance

fields.label: Encumbrances & Caveats
fields.help_text: Search title for mortgages, caveats, court orders — any found = fail trigger

fields.label: Display (Dead Pixels, Backlight Bleed)
fields.help_text: Display solid colors — check corners for backlight bleed

fields.label: Screen Hinge Condition
fields.help_text: Open/close — should hold position at all angles without wobble

fields.label: Keyboard (All Keys Function)
fields.help_text: Use keyboard test website — check every key including Fn combinations

fields.label: Trackpad (Click & Gesture)
fields.help_text: Test click, right-click, two-finger scroll, pinch-to-zoom

fields.label: Battery Cycle Count & Health
fields.help_text: Windows: powercfg /batteryreport. Mac: System Info > Power — note design vs full capacity

fields.label: RAM Amount & Type
fields.help_text: Verify installed RAM matches advertised spec

fields.label: Storage Drive Health (SMART Data)
fields.help_text: Run CrystalDiskInfo (Win) or DiskScan (Mac) — any SMART warnings = fail trigger

fields.label: Storage Capacity & Type (SSD/HDD)
fields.help_text: Verify actual storage matches spec — check if original or upgraded

fields.label: Processor (Benchmark Score)
fields.help_text: Run Cinebench or PassMark — compare to known good score for that CPU

fields.label: GPU (if dedicated) Function
fields.help_text: Stress test with GPU-Z or render test — check temperatures and artifacts

fields.label: USB Ports (All Types & Speeds)
fields.help_text: Test each USB port with USB 3.0 drive — verify transfer speed

fields.label: HDMI / DisplayPort Output
fields.help_text: Connect external monitor — verify signal and resolution

fields.label: Wi-Fi & Bluetooth
fields.help_text: Connect to 5GHz and 2.4GHz — run speed test

fields.label: Webcam & Microphone
fields.help_text: Test video call quality — check autofocus and audio clarity

fields.label: Speakers & Headphone Jack
fields.help_text: Play audio — check for distortion at volume. Test 3.5mm jack

fields.label: Cooling System (Temperatures Under Load)
fields.help_text: Run stress test for 5 min — CPU should not exceed 95°C. Throttling = fail

fields.label: Chassis Condition (Cracks, Warping)
fields.help_text: Check lid, base, and palm rest — cracks near hinge indicate drop damage

fields.label: Serial Number & BIOS Info
fields.help_text: Record serial — check against any blacklist or theft registry

fields.label: Operating System & License
fields.help_text: Note OS version and whether license is genuine and transferable

fields.label: Charger & Cable Condition
fields.help_text: Check charger for fraying, correct wattage, and charging speed

fields.label: Battery Run-Time Test
fields.help_text: Discharge from 100% at normal load — note time to 20%

fields.label: Fan Noise & Vibration
fields.help_text: Excessive fan noise at idle indicates cooling paste degradation or failing fan

fields.label: Engine Start (Cold & Warm)
fields.help_text: Cold start without choke assistance after warm-up — ease of starting indicates condition

fields.label: Engine Oil Level & Condition
fields.help_text: Check dipstick — dark sludge indicates neglected maintenance

fields.label: Output Voltage (No Load)
fields.help_text: 220–240V nominal — outside ±10% indicates regulator fault

fields.label: Output Voltage (Full Load)
fields.help_text: Apply rated load — voltage should remain stable within ±5%

fields.label: Output Frequency
fields.help_text: 50Hz nominal — check with meter under load

fields.label: Fuel Leaks (Tank, Lines, Carb)
fields.help_text: Fuel smell or drips — immediate fail, fire hazard

fields.label: Air Filter Condition
fields.help_text: Remove and inspect — heavily clogged affects performance

fields.label: Spark Plug Condition
fields.help_text: Remove plug — check electrode gap, carbon fouling, oil fouling

fields.label: Automatic Voltage Regulator (AVR)
fields.help_text: Confirm AVR type and operation — protects connected equipment

fields.label: Circuit Breaker & Overload Protection
fields.help_text: Test trip function — breaker should trip at rated amperage

fields.label: Earth Connection
fields.help_text: Verify proper earth stake connected — essential for safety

fields.label: Fuel Tank Capacity & Condition
fields.help_text: Confirm tank capacity, check for rust inside tank

fields.label: Runtime Per Tank (Tested)
fields.help_text: Run until empty at 75% load — compare to manufacturer spec

fields.label: Noise Level
fields.help_text: Measure at 7 metres — relevant for residential use

fields.label: Control Panel (Meters & Switches)
fields.help_text: All meters and switches operational — hourmeter shows actual use

fields.label: Battery (Electric Start Models)
fields.help_text: Battery condition and cold cranking performance

fields.label: Frame & Body Condition
fields.help_text: Rust, cracks in frame, wheel condition

fields.label: Service History & Hours
fields.help_text: Record hourmeter reading — oil change due every 250 hours
